name: Chevre Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the rind from the cheese and allow it to stand at room temperature.
2. Combine the cheese, margarine (or butter), milk, paprika, and ground red pepper in a blender container.
3. Cover and blend on high speed, stopping occasionally to scrape the sides until smooth, about 1 minute.
4. Stir in the chopped pecans and olives.
5. Cover and refrigerate until firm, approximately 2 hours.
6. Garnish with pecan halves and chopped ripe olives if desired.
7. Serve with crackers. Each serving contains 1 cup of pate (approximately 2 tablespoons per cracker) and is about 60 calories.
